Document:
# Regulations on Medical Due to the importance of emergency medical aid, Medical facilities are expected to abide by the following in order to ensure their department remains orderly and does not violate persons entering as patients.
## Authority of the Chief Medical Officer - The Chief Medical Officer has the ability to designate all standards and procedures for their medbay. All Medical staff and patients must abide by any standards laid out by the Chief Medical Officer. - The Chief Medical Officer is the highest authority within the medbay. All people within the medbay, including non-patients or staff, must listen to all orders given by the Chief Medical Officer. Only the Overseer is exempt from this.
